accepted.bullet_text: [[ral-zarek]] — *Modern Horizons 3 Saga — Implicit Maze discovery, retrospective rendering* aspect. The figure in the white-and-red geometrically-patterned outfit crouching dynamically on the black volcanic surface amid looping fire arcs is Ral mid-maze-run, depicted in volcanic-surfing register. The three Saga chapters render the *Dragon's Maze* 2013 block championship arc as a retrospective nearly a decade later — Niv-Mizzet's lieutenant working the maze the dragon-parun ordered him to find. `[cohort node body: Modern Horizons 3 Saga aspect entry]`
accepted.archetype_slot: Modern Horizons 3 Saga — Implicit Maze discovery, retrospective rendering

accepted.bullet_text: [[ral-zarek]] — *War of the Spark — Ravnica defection, lazotep-melting-point moment* aspect. The flavor attribution — *"Time to find the melting point of lazotep." —Ral Zarek* — is the in-fiction announcement of Ral's defection from Bolas's payroll, with lazotep being the alchemical material Bolas used to encase the Eternal army. The card sits in the canonical "Ral's <Spell>" attribution cycle (Ral's Dispersal, Ral's Staticaster, Ral's Vanguard, Ral's Outburst) — non-planeswalker spells flavor-attributed to him as caster, the in-fiction equivalent of a magewright's lab notebook. `[Scryfall flavor_text; cohort node body: War of the Spark aspect entry + attribution-cycle section]`
accepted.archetype_slot: War of the Spark — Ravnica defection, lazotep-melting-point moment
